**Overview**

This dashboard offers a comprehensive view of insights into the SharePoint Site Usage in your organization.

The dashboard offers control to filter the data such as Report Refresh Date, Site Id, Site URL, and Site Owner. It provides essential metrics such as total number of SharePoint Sites, Active Files Count, and Pages Viewed. It contains a view of total active sites broken-down by activity type per day. It also includes several timeline visualisations such as site activity by activity type, top sites with most total files, top sites with most storage used, and top sites with most storage allocated.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/o365/overview)
